commands.review_summary:
The branch imports an existing session archive filename predicate into memory-core dreaming ingestion, skips archive transcript filenames before collecting session corpus, and adds a light-dreaming regression test.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +137. Total +141 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main lists usage-counted reset/deleted archives for agents, and dreaming collection consumes that list before only skipping checkpoint transcripts. I did not run the repro because this review is read-only.
